title: Floral Luminous Norwegian Salmon Bowl
description: A light, keto-friendly Norwegian bowl that showcases fresh salmon, a hint of truffle oil, and floral garnishes in a steam-softened medley.
instructions: Preheat the oven to 200°C (400°F). Toss cauliflower florets with a splash of olive oil, salt, and pepper, then roast for 15–18 minutes until golden.

Season salmon fillets with salt, pepper, and garlic powder. Heat a non‑stick skillet over medium heat, sear salmon skin‑side down for 2–3 minutes, then flip and cook for another 2–3 minutes until just opaque.
Meanwhile, steam the cucumber ribbons and radish slices for 1–2 minutes to keep them crisp and cool.
Scoop roasted cauliflower into a bowl, top with the seared salmon fillet, and arrange radish slices, cucumber ribbons, microgreens, and a sprinkle of sesame seeds.
Drizzle truffle oil over the bowl and zest lemon on top for a bright finish.
Add fresh dill, a pinch of salt if needed, and serve immediately, letting the steam from the salmon keep the bowl warm.
